resources.title: Learning How to Learn
resources.access: 平台访问政策可能因地区和时间变化；证书非必需

resources.language: 英文；课程页提供中文版本入口

resources.title: PowerShell 101: Chapter 1 - Getting Started
resources.required_scope: What is PowerShell、launch、execution policy、review

resources.required_scope: branch、commit、pull request、merge 全部完成
